Detailed Description

void bcl_link_method ( class_t *  cl,
method_t *  method 
)

Executes the actual linking of a method, implements the METHOD_LOAD field

Parameters:
cl The class owning the requesting method
method The method to be linked

Definition at line 2077 of file loader.c.

References method_t::code, method_t::cp, cp_get_class(), method_t::data, method_t::handlers, initialize_class(), load_bytecode(), load_exception_handlers(), method_is_linked(), method_is_main(), method_set_linked(), thread_self(), tm_lock(), tm_unlock(), and translate_bytecode().

Referenced by interpreter().

const uint8_t* bcl_link_opcode ( const method_t *  method,
const uint8_t *  lpc,
internal_opcode_t  opcode 
)

Link a *_PRELINK opcode. The function behaviour changes depending on the opcode however all that is needed for the opcode to be linked properly is done in this function (for example class initialization). The function returns the same program counter it receives, this is done to 'cast away the constness' of the program counter

Parameters:
method The method holding the opcode to be processed
lpc The program-counter pointing to the opcode to be linked
opcode The opcode value, this is used at the contents of the memory pointed by the program-counter may change if more than one thread tries to link it at the same time
Returns:
The program counter pointing to the linked opcode

Definition at line 2244 of file loader.c.

References ANEWARRAY_PRELINK, array_name(), bcl_resolve_class(), c_throw, CHECKCAST_PRELINK, class_get_dimensions(), class_get_id(), class_is_abstract(), class_is_parent(), class_is_super(), method_t::code, CONSTANT_Class, CONSTANT_Class_resolved, method_t::cp, cp_get_class(), cp_get_class_name(), cp_get_resolved_class(), cp_get_tag(), dbg_unreachable, field_t::descriptor, gc_free(), gc_malloc(), get_type_specific_opcode(), GETFIELD_PRELINK, GETSTATIC_PRELINK, initialize_class(), INSTANCEOF_PRELINK, INVOKEINTERFACE_PRELINK, INVOKESPECIAL_PRELINK, INVOKESTATIC_PRELINK, INVOKEVIRTUAL_PRELINK, JAVA_LANG_NOCLASSDEFFOUNDERROR, JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR, LDC_PRELINK, LDC_W_PRELINK, method_create_packed_index(), method_is_init(), method_is_static(), MULTIANEWARRAY_PRELINK, class_t::name, method_t::name, NEW_FINALIZER, NEW_PRELINK, NEWARRAY_PRELINK, field_t::offset, PUTFIELD_PRELINK, PUTSTATIC_PRELINK, resolve_class(), resolve_instance_field(), resolve_method(), resolve_static_field(), store_int16_un, thread_self(), tm_lock(), and tm_unlock().

static void load_method_attribute_Exceptions ( class_t *cl  ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
class_file_t *  cf,
method_attributes_t *attr  ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED 
) [static]

Loads the Exceptions attribute of a method

Jelatine doesn't use this attribute actually even if it recognizes it as the virtual machine specification mentions that only the compiler should check which exceptions are thrown and which aren't

Parameters:
cl A pointer to the current class
cf A pointer to the class file
attr A pointer to a method_attributes_t structure used to store the attribute data

finalizer The pointed variable will hold true if the class has a finalizer, false otherwise

static field_t * lookup_field ( class_t **  pcl,
const char *  name,
const char *  descriptor,
bool  stat 
) [static]

Do a field lookup as described in the VM spec §5.4.3.2

Parameters:
pcl A pointer to the class from which the lookup shall begin, filled with the class to which the field belongs when returning
name The field name
descriptor The field descriptor
stat true if the field is a static field, false otherwise
Returns:
The requested field or NULL if the field could not be found, if the field is found but is not accessible from acl the function will throw an exception

Definition at line 1968 of file loader.c.

References class_get_field(), class_is_object(), interface_itr(), interface_itr_get_next(), interface_itr_has_next(), class_t::interface_manager, and class_t::parent.

Referenced by resolve_instance_field(), and resolve_static_field().

static uint32_t next_interface_id ( void   )  [static]

Returns the next index for an interface method

Returns:
The next index for an interface method

Definition at line 998 of file loader.c.

References loader_t::interface_methods.

Referenced by assign_interface_indexes().

static class_t * preload_class ( const char *  name,
size_t  ref_n,
size_t  nref_size 
) [static]

Preloads a class, the class structure is allocated and initialized only with its name, id and layout information. This is enough to enable the memory allocator to create new objects of the said class. Note that this function doesn't take the class lock, hence it can be used only during the bootstrap phase, all subsequent classes will be loaded using bcl_resolve_class()

Parameters:
name The name of the class
ref_n The number of references of a class' instance
nref_size The size of the non-reference area of a class' instance
Returns:
A pointer to the preloaded class

Definition at line 466 of file loader.c.

References class_set_state(), loader_t::class_table, CS_PRELOADED, gc_palloc(), get_new_class_id(), class_t::id, class_t::name, class_t::nref_size, class_t::ref_n, and utf8_intern().

Referenced by bcl_preload_bootstrap_classes().

static class_t * resolve_class ( class_t *  orig,
uint16_t  index 
) [static]

Resolves a class reference

Parameters:
orig The originating class
index Indes in the constant-pool were the class descriptor lies
Returns:
A pointer to the class

static field_t * resolve_instance_field ( class_t *  acl,
uint16_t  index 
) [static]

Resolves an instance field

Parameters:
acl A pointer to the class requesting the resolution
index An index in the class' constant pool holding the CONSTANT_Fieldref structure describing the field to be resolved
Returns:
A pointer to the field, throws an exception if the field cannot be resolved or isn't found

static method_t * resolve_method ( class_t *  src,
uint16_t  index,
bool  interface 
) [static]

Resolves a method if it wasn't already done

Parameters:
src A pointer to the class requesting the resolution
index An index in the class' constant pool holding the CONSTANT_Methodref or CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodsref structure describing the method to be resolved
interface Set to true if the requested method belongs to an interface
Returns:
A pointer to the method, throws an exception if the method cannot be resolved or isn't found
